title: stachys rugosa var. linearis
intro: Stachys rugosa var. linearis, also known as Wrinkle-leaf Skullcap, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae), characterized by its distinctive wrinkled leaves and blue-purple flowers. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Wrinkle-leaf Skullcap include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Wrinkle-leaf Skullcap can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
